code:
sequenceDiagram participant C as Customer participant W as Web Frontend participant A as API Server participant D as Database participant S as Staff participant F as File Storage Note over C,F: Manual Payment Flow %% Start Payment C->>W: Click "Pay Now" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/start Note right of W: {Education_ContentCDN} A->>D: Create Payment record Note right of A: status: PENDING D-->>A: Payment created A-->>W: {Education_StudentDB} W-->>C: Show payment instructions %% Upload Proof C->>W: Upload payment proof W->>A: POST /payments/manual/proof Note right of W: multipart/form-data
{Education_StudentDB} A->>F: Store proof file Note right of A: Validate file type, size F-->>A: File stored A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: UNDER_REVIEW
proofUrl: file_path D-->>A: Payment updated A-->>W: {Education_GradeSync} W-->>C: "Payment under review" %% Staff Review S->>W: Login to admin panel W->>A: GET /admin/payments/pending A->>D: Query pending payments D-->>A: Pending payments A-->>W: List of pending payments W-->>S: Show payment details & proof alt Payment Approved S->>W: Click "Approve" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {Education_GradeSync} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: SUCCEEDED
reviewedAt: now(Education_LMS_Portal) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: PAID
paidAt: now(Education_StudentDB) D-->>A: Order updated A->>D: Create Delivery Note right of A: Generate token hash
status: PENDING D-->>A: Delivery created A-->>W: {Education_StudentDB} W-->>S: "Payment approved" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_APPROVED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status else Payment Rejected S->>W: Click "Reject" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {Education_ClassroomService} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: FAILED
reviewedAt: now(Education_StudentDB) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: CANCELED
canceledAt: now(Education_GradeSync) D-->>A: Order updated A-->>W: {Education_ContentCDN} W-->>S: "Payment rejected" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_REJECTED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status end %% Customer Response C->>W: Check payment status W->>A: GET /orders/{Education_LMS_Portal} A->>D: Query order with payment D-->>A: Order data A-->>W: Order details W-->>C: Show updated status alt Payment Approved C->>W: Access delivery W->>A: POST /deliveries/reveal Note right of W: {Education_StudentDB} A->>D: Verify token & update delivery Note right of A: revealsLeft: 0
revealedAt: now(Education_ClassroomService) D-->>A: Delivery updated A-->>W: {Education_StudentDB} W-->>C: Show delivery content end
repo_description: KMB monorepo (web + api) with Next.js, NestJS, Prisma, Turborepo, full security hardening and CI/CD

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个手动付款流程的时序图，场景是教育平台的课程购买。用户点击付款后，因为不支持在线支付，需要上传转账凭证，然后后台人工审核。
明白，这个流程涉及哪些系统模块？我看到有用户端、管理后台，中间应该还有API服务和数据存储吧？
对，参与者包括Customer、Web Frontend、API Server、Database，还有Staff后台审核人员。另外需要File Storage来存用户上传的凭证图片。
好的，我先画出主干流程：用户点击"立即支付"，前端调用POST /payments/manual/start创建待支付记录，然后返回付款指引给用户。
接下来用户上传凭证，这里要注意文件验证，大小和类型都要检查。API把文件存到File Storage，然后更新支付状态为UNDER_REVIEW。
上传用multipart/form-data，对吧？存完后前端提示"付款审核中"。然后Staff登录管理后台查询待审核列表，这个用GET /admin/payments/pending。
审核这里要画一个alt分支：通过或拒绝。如果通过，Staff点击"通过"，API更新支付状态为SUCCEEDED，同时更新订单为PAID，还要创建Delivery记录生成token。
拒绝分支呢？状态怎么流转？
拒绝的话，支付状态变FAILED，订单变CANCELED。两个分支最后都要通知用户，用SSE推送到Customer端。
我加上通知逻辑：Create Notification，type区分PAYMENT_APPROVED和PAYMENT_REJECTED，然后SSE推送payment.status。最后用户主动查询订单状态，如果通过了还能访问Delivery内容。
访问Delivery那里，用户调用POST /deliveries/reveal，API验证token后更新delivery，把revealsLeft设为0，记录revealedAt时间戳。
完整了。整个流程覆盖：创建支付→上传凭证→人工审核（通过/拒绝双分支）→通知用户→查询状态→获取内容。我检查一下各系统标注，Education_StudentDB、Education_GradeSync这些标记都对应上了。
